headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Entergy, Raises Price Target to $115
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Nicholas Amicucci   maintains Entergy (NYSE:ETR) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $107 to $115.
